stories.title: Amed Rosario's Two-Homer, 5-RBI Comeback Powers Yankees' 8-2 Start

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
The Yankees were 0-for-12 with runners in scoring position in last night's game.

Then Amed Rosario hit two home runs in the 8th inning.

Yankees win 5-3. New York is 8-2. The historically dominant start rolls on. #Yankees

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Amed Rosario last night:
🏠 Solo HR in the 1st
🏠 3-run go-ahead HR in the 8th (off Leiter Jr.)

5 RBI total. First multi-homer game since 2021.

That's the most Yankees comeback possible. #Yankees #MLB

article.headline: Amed Rosario Hits Two Home Runs as Yankees Rally From 3-1 Deficit to Stay at 8-2

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
Amed Rosario Comeback

**Concept 1A — Social (1080x1350)**
- **Type:** gemini / base_only
- **Prompt:** Dark navy and white Yankees color scheme. Large bold white text "COMEBACK COMPLETE" at top. Below: "Rosario: 2 HRs · 5 RBI" in gold. "Yankees 5, Athletics 3" subtitle. "8th Inning Hero" in smaller text. No player likeness. Stadium lights bokeh in background.
- **Caption overlay:** "Rosario Saves the Night"

**Concept 1B — Article Hero (1200x630)**
- **Type:** gemini / complete
- **Prompt:** Baseball stadium at night, packed crowd, batter completing home run swing, ball trajectory visible against bright stadium lights. Navy and white color palette. Cinematic wide angle. Clean composition.

stories.title: Reds' Burns (0.82 ERA) and Lowder (1.30 ERA) Are Making History Together

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
The Cincinnati Reds have two starters simultaneously posting ERAs not seen since before Lou Gehrig.

Chase Burns: 0.82 ERA
Rhett Lowder: 1.30 ERA (lowest through 8 career starts by a Reds pitcher since 1913)

Their offense is last in OPS with RISP. They keep winning. #Reds #MLB

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Rhett Lowder's ERA through his first 8 career starts: 1.30.

In the expansion era, only four pitchers have started careers with a lower ERA.

One of them is Fernando Valenzuela.

The Cincinnati Reds found something special. #Reds #MLB

article.headline: Chase Burns (0.82 ERA) and Rhett Lowder (1.30 ERA) Are Making History for the Cincinnati Reds

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
Reds' Burns and Lowder Historic ERA

**Concept 2A — Social (1080x1350)**
- **Type:** gemini / base_only
- **Prompt:** Cincinnati Reds red and white color scheme. Two ERA stats displayed prominently: "0.82 ERA" and "1.30 ERA" in large bold white text on dark background. "Chase Burns + Rhett Lowder" header. "Not Seen Since 1913" subtitle in gold. Clean modern sports graphic.
- **Caption overlay:** "Making History in Cincinnati"

**Concept 2B — Article Hero (1200x630)**

- **Prompt:** Overhead view of a baseball diamond, pitcher on mound in mid-delivery, stadium full of fans. Red color tones with Cincinnati feel. Dramatic low-angle stadium lighting.

stories.title: Yankees Allow Just 8 Runs in First 9 Games — Matching 1943 Record

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
The Yankees have allowed 8 runs through their first 9 games.

That ties the 2002 Giants and 1993 Braves for the fewest in modern MLB.

They're doing this without Gerrit Cole and Carlos Rodon.

This rotation is absurd. #Yankees #MLB

article.headline: The Yankees Have Allowed 8 Runs Through 9 Games — Matching a Record From 1943

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
Yankees Historic Team ERA

**Concept 3A — Social (1080x1350)**
- **Type:** gemini / base_only
- **Prompt:** New York Yankees pinstripes design on dark background. Large bold "8 RUNS ALLOWED" text. Below: "Through 9 Games" and "Matching an 83-Year-Old Record" in clean white typography. "1943" in faded text in background.
- **Caption overlay:** "Historically Dominant"

stories.title: Milwaukee Brewers at 8-2 — The Biggest Early Surprise in Baseball

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
PECOTA projected the Brewers to finish 81-81 this season.

Through 10 games, Milwaukee is 8-2 with a +30 run differential — 2nd best in baseball.

Nobody told the Brewers they were supposed to be average. #Brewers #MLB

article.headline: The Milwaukee Brewers Are 8-2 and Nobody Predicted This

- **Caption overlay:** "Milwaukee's Hot"

stories.title: Rockies Sweep Astros — First Series Win Since Mid-June 2025

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
The Rockies scored 8 runs in the 5th inning Monday.

Then Kyle Freeland allowed 1 run in 6.1 innings Tuesday.

Colorado swept the Astros and won their first series since mid-June 2025. #Rockies #MLB

article.headline: Rockies Sweep Astros — An 8-Run Inning and a Shutdown Performance for Colorado's First Series Win in Nine Months

stories.title: Konnor Griffin Makes History — First Teen to Debut Since Juan Soto in 2018

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
First at-bat. 19 years old.

Konnor Griffin hit a 105.8 mph RBI double in his MLB debut.

He is the first teenager to debut as a position player since Juan Soto did it in 2018.

Pittsburgh, your future is here. #Pirates #MLB

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:

- **Caption overlay:** "Future Is Now"

stories.title: Injury Wave — Betts, Soto, and Brown All Hit IL Early

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
Three playoff contenders lost their best player this week:

🔴 Mookie Betts — oblique strain, IL
🔵 Juan Soto — calf strain, IL
🟠 Hunter Brown — elbow, IL

The division races are already shifting. #MLB
